issues.title: Incorrect Revenue Calculation
issues.problem: The query is summing all amounts without filtering for completed transactions only.
issues.fix: SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue

issues.title: Missing Filter for Completed Transactions
issues.problem: The query does not filter transactions by status, which is required for correct revenue calculation.

issues.title: Unnecessary Columns in GROUP BY
issues.problem: Including m.email in the GROUP BY clause is unnecessary and can be removed.

issues.title: Ambiguous Column Name
issues.problem: The column name 'created_at' is not present in the schema. It should be 'transaction_date'.

issues.title: Missing Comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the purpose and logic.
issues.fix: Add comments to explain the purpose and logic of the query.

review.corrected_sql:
SELECT
    t.merchant_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue,
    m.merchant_name
FROM fact_transactions t
JOIN dim_merchant m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED' AND t.transaction_date > '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY t.merchant_id, m.merchant_name;
review.summary: The query had issues with incorrect revenue calculation, missing status filter, unnecessary columns in GROUP BY, and readability improvements.
